utterances.speaker: Mr. Posner
utterances.text: You have a very impressive resume , Ms . Green . I especially like what I see here about implementing a new filing system .

emotion_cause.span: 1_You have a very impressive resume , Ms . Green . I especially like what I see here about implementing a new filing system .

5_You mean those ... those little colored labels you put on all the folders ?

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: You mean those ... those little colored labels you put on all the folders ?

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: It certainly did brighten up the inside of the filing cabinets .

emotion_cause.span: 6_It certainly did brighten up the inside of the filing cabinets .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , they uh , they ... they do more than that .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Lynch
utterances.text: I notice that you have been trusted with a lot of rather important responsibilities .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes , Joanna really has been an incredible mentor to me .

emotion_cause.span: 9_Joanna really has been an incredible mentor to me .

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: Oh . And Rachel has been really incredible in getting my morning bagel for me . It is amazing how she gets it right almost every time !

emotion_cause.span: 10_Rachel has been really incredible in getting my morning bagel for me . It is amazing how she gets it right almost every time !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I ... I ... I of course , I have more responsibilities than that .

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: Oh yes , well there is the coffee too . Rachel can carry two things at once !

emotion_cause.span: 12_Rachel can carry two things at once !

utterances.speaker: Mr. Posner
utterances.text: Yes , that is very good . Now a uh , big part of this job is cultivating personal relationships , especially with designers .

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: And Rachel should not have any problem with that . The only problem might be getting a little too friendly , if you know what I mean .

utterances.speaker: Joanna
utterances.text: With them , under them , what the difference ? Eh , Rach ?
